user_text: hôm nay anh và em đã làm những gì
bot_text:
Tóm tắt công việc ngày 19/05/2026:
- Updated RECONCILE_COD_SHEET_GID in projects/fb-ads-automation/.env from 1034910254 to 1159924290 to write COD reconcile data into the new tab.
- Verified runtime config OK (python -m app.main --check-config) and confirmed Google Sheets tab resolution for new gid: Doi-soat.
- Implemented Bot 2 (media research) as a separate Telegram process in projects/fb-ads-automation:
- Added new modules: media_main, media_bot, media_settings, media_command_parser, media_research_service, media_sheet_service, media_storage_service, media_approval_service, media_constants.
- Added new service scripts: scripts/service/install-media-service.ps1 and scripts/service/run-media-bot.ps1.
- Added Bot 2 env template block in .env.example and usage/setup docs in README.md.
- Implemented flow: photo + /media <SKU> [keyword] -> Cloudinary upload -> SerpApi multi-engine search -> dedupe/rank/cap -> preview -> approval callback -> Google Sheet upsert.
- Added guardrails: authorized user check, daily run quota, max API calls per run, sheet config validation, callback expiry handling.

Kết quả vận hành nhanh: POS ~14,344,000 VND, Ads ~3,664,046 VND, ROAS 3.91
